title: Test Spec (chain test / 테스트 명세 + 실 test 코드 메타)
description: v2.0 chain harness 의 test stage 산출물. acceptance-criteria 기반 실 test 코드 자동 생성 (RED 의무). 5종 물증 7 필드 (★ no-simulation 강화). DEC-2026-05-06-v2.0-i-strict-채택 정합. ★ v11.0.0 MAJOR 확장 (DEC-2026-05-26-contract-강제-양-axis §1 layer 3 hard gate) — test_cases[].framework hint 확장 (schemathesis/dredd/pact/playwright-visual/axe-core/percy/chromatic 추가) + openapi_contract_ref (BE contract framework 본격 required) + visual_regression_ref (FE visual framework 본격 required) 본격 if/then.

type.description: ★ B4 — 8 → 10 enum 확장 (visual + a11y 추가 / v11.0.0 contract 강제 양 axis 정합). contract = BE openapi 정합 / visual = FE visual regression / a11y = FE accessibility (WCAG)

framework.description: ★ B3 open enum — 사내 stack 추가 시 schema 변경 ❌ / hint = jest/vitest/jasmine/mocha/junit5/pytest/rspec/gotest/playwright/cypress/supertest/testcontainers/schemathesis/dredd/pact/spring-cloud-contract/playwright-visual/axe-core/percy/chromatic 등. ★ v11.0.0 — BE contract framework (schemathesis/dredd/pact/spring-cloud-contract) 시 openapi_contract_ref 본격 required / FE visual framework (playwright-visual/axe-core/percy/chromatic) 시 visual_regression_ref 본격 required (allOf if/then).

source_file.description: 실 test 코드 파일 경로 (예: src/test/java/UserSignupTest.java)

source_evidence.description: ★ no-simulation — test 코드 excerpt (≤ 500 char) / 실 코드가 source_file 에 존재함을 입증

expected_outcome.description: ★ chain test RED 의무 = 'fail' (impl 부재 / chain impl GREEN 시 'pass' 격상)

test_intent.description: ★ v11.11.0 — use-scenario S2(AX전환) gate (C-use-scenario-s2-gate / DEC-2026-05-30-s2-gate-slice). characterization = 기존 legacy 동작 포착 (in-place 증강 시 expected_outcome='pass' 정합 / legacy 코드 존재 → GREEN 기대) / augmentation = 신규 증강분 (impl 부재 → expected_outcome='fail'(test stage) RED 정합). optional (additive / S2 외 시나리오 미사용 / 미지정 = aggregate 매트릭스 fallback). gate per_tc_outcome 분기가 expected_outcome ↔ test_intent 정합으로 characterization GREEN + augmentation RED 혼합을 검증.

fail_mode.description: ★ F-SIM-005 P1 본격 흡수 (v8.14.0 / DEC-2026-05-23-fsim-005-corroboration-2-genuine). per-TC RED granularity 의무화. compile_import_fail = Beck-canonical 정합 (Kent Beck 2002 preface p.x verbatim 'test doesn't even compile at first') / assertion_fail = per-TC RED 표준 / dry_run_placeholder = ★ corroboration 자격 ❌ (Adzic SBE 10년 폐기 함정 직접 회피 — gojko.net/2020/03/17/sbe-10-years.html) / pending = Cucumber yellow (skipped) 정합 (Senior REVISE-1 추가 권고). expected_outcome='fail' 시 권고 (optional / chain test RED granularity 입증). expected_outcome='pass' (chain impl GREEN) 시 미사용.

impl_module_ref.description: ★ chain impl forward link (chain test RED 시 미정 / chain impl GREEN 시 채움)

code_pointers.description: ★ operation.md 결정 3 + P2 — artifact ↔ code anchor. graph-synthesizer 가 평탄화 / code-pointer-validator 가 검증.

openapi_contract_ref.description: ★ v11.0.0 신설 (DEC-2026-05-26-contract-강제-양-axis §1 layer 3 hard gate). BE contract framework (schemathesis/dredd/pact/spring-cloud-contract) 시 본격 required (allOf if/then).

contract_file.description: Pact contract file path 또는 spring-cloud-contract DSL file path (선택)

visual_regression_ref.description: ★ v11.0.0 신설 (DEC-2026-05-26-contract-강제-양-axis §1 layer 3 hard gate). FE visual framework (playwright-visual/axe-core/percy/chromatic) 시 본격 required (allOf if/then).

state_map_ref.description: state-map.json 안 state id (예: PasswordChangeForm.idle / loading / error)

dtcg_token_set.description: DTCG W3C token set (예: default / dark)

baseline_screenshot.description: baseline screenshot path (visual regression diff anchor)

reproduction_command.description: ★ B5 array 허용 — multi-step 명령 (e.g., docker compose up && pytest)

result_hash.description: ★ B5 정규화 — hash 대상 = stdout 의 (timestamp+duration_ms 제외 / sorted test names + pass/fail/skip count)

report_format.description: ★ B5 — SARIF 2.1.0 (OASIS / GitHub Code Scanning native) 우선 권고

flaky_retries_count.description: ★ ★ ADR-CHAIN-004 §5 — Playwright 정합 per-test cap 2. 본 필드 = 실제 retry 발생 횟수 누적 (정상 1회 통과 = 0). 3회+ retry = 진짜 fail / fail_count 증가.

allOf.$comment: ★ v11.0.0 if/then — framework in BE contract 4종 (schemathesis/dredd/pact/spring-cloud-contract) 시 openapi_contract_ref 본격 required (DEC-2026-05-26-contract-강제-양-axis §1 layer 3 hard gate).
★ v11.0.0 if/then — framework in FE visual/a11y 4종 (playwright-visual/axe-core/percy/chromatic) 시 visual_regression_ref 본격 required.

link_coverage.description: AC-* / BHV-* / UC-* 가 ≥ 1 TC-* 에 ref 되는 비율 (chain 정합 의무)

severity_floor.description: ★ DO-178C DAL A 차용 (Official research 권고)

test_pass_rate.description: ★ chain test = 0.0 (RED 의무) / chain impl = 1.0 (GREEN 의무 / gate #impl) — 본 schema 는 chain test 단계 / chain impl 은 impl-spec 에서 1.0 의무

chain_attempt.description: ★ Industry research — retry cap (SOTA pass rate gap 봉쇄)
